title: Grant Masson
compiled_truth: Grant Masson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-11-30 to 2000-09-27), Grant Masson sent 28 and received 333 emails, totalling 361 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (23), [Tanya Tamarchenko](people/tanya-tamarchenko) (4), [Shirley Crenshaw](people/shirley-crenshaw) (3), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (3), [Tara Rozen](people/tara-rozen) (2).
